title: My
subtitle: AI/ML projects spanning LLM applications, RAG systems, conversational agents, and enterprise-grade FMCG analytics — from open-source demos to production deployments.

items.title: Sales Intelligence Chat — Ask Your Data Anything
items.desc: Chat with a 14-million-row FMCG sales dataset in plain English using GPT-4 and LangChain agents. Full multi-turn session memory — every follow-up question builds on the last answer, just like talking to a human analyst. Auto-detects tables, numbers, and text for the best display format. Memory-optimised loader cuts RAM by ~80%.

items.title: AI-Powered Document Q&A Bot
items.desc: Full end-to-end RAG pipeline — upload any PDF, ask questions in plain English, and get precise answers with source page citations. Implements document loading, 500-token overlapping chunking, OpenAI embeddings, FAISS vector indexing, and GPT-3.5-turbo synthesis. Grounded answers: no hallucinations.

items.title: Conversational AI Chatbot with Memory
items.desc: Stateful multi-turn AI chatbot that genuinely remembers what you said. LangChain ConversationBufferMemory and ConversationChain maintain full context across the entire session — every reply is context-aware, not a fresh one-shot call. Streamlit session_state keeps memory alive across UI reruns without resetting conversation.

items.title: E-Commerce AI Chatbot — Fully Offline
items.desc: Fully offline AI chatbot for e-commerce — zero cloud dependency, zero API cost. LLaMA 3 runs locally via Ollama with LangChain for context-aware Q&A. Supports both general knowledge queries and business-specific contextual answers from your own product/policy data. Ideal for private deployments.

items.title: AI-Powered Resume Assistant — Fully Offline
items.desc: Privacy-first offline LLM assistant for resume generation and contextual rewriting — no data ever leaves the machine. LLaMA 3 via Ollama with structured prompt chaining generates role-targeted resumes, rewrites experience bullets, and adapts tone for any job description.

items.title: AiSight ETL & Airflow Data Pipeline
items.desc: Enterprise-grade data orchestration pipeline for FMCG clients at AiSight.ai. Automates ingestion, transformation, and loading of multi-source sales and distribution data via Apache Airflow DAGs — enabling downstream ML models and real-time analytics dashboards to consume clean, structured data at scale.

items.title: Time-Series Classification: Hydra + MultiRocket
items.desc: State-of-the-art time-series classification combining the Hydra and MultiRocket algorithms. Benchmarked across multiple FMCG and financial datasets, achieving top-tier accuracy with minimal compute. Designed as a drop-in classifier for sequential sales, demand, and stock-price data.

items.title: Speech Mispronunciation Detection with wav2vec2
items.desc: Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis system fine-tuned on wav2vec2. Identifies and localises phoneme-level pronunciation errors in non-native speech — providing targeted feedback for language learners. Fine-tuned on annotated speech corpora with extended-PA labels for per-phoneme scoring.

items.title: AI Music Composition Engine
items.desc: Generative deep learning system that composes original music sequences using character-level LSTM models trained on MIDI data. Produces multi-instrument melodies with controllable style and tempo — exploring the intersection of creative AI and sequence modelling at a research level.

items.title: AiSight Territory Footfall Analytics
items.desc: Interactive geospatial analytics platform mapping distributor footfall, route coverage, and territory penetration for Pakistan's leading FMCG brands. Visualises outlet-level visit patterns, coverage gaps, and territory performance on dynamic maps built on AiSight's distribution intelligence layer.

items.title: BAT Territory Distribution Intelligence
items.desc: End-to-end territory distribution analytics solution for British American Tobacco Pakistan. Provides brand managers with SKU-level territory coverage, outlet universe mapping, and weighted distribution metrics — enabling data-driven field force deployment and market expansion decisions.

items.title: EBM Revenue Growth Management Dashboard
items.desc: Production-deployed Revenue Growth Management BI dashboard for EBM (English Biscuits Manufacturers). Consolidates SKU pricing, pack-mix optimisation, distribution coverage, and competitive benchmarking into a single real-time view — driving commercial growth decisions for Pakistan's leading biscuit brand.

items.title: SurveyAuto AI Demand Forecasting
items.desc: Multi-model demand and sales forecasting system deployed for SurveyAuto. Combines ARIMA, XGBoost, and LSTM ensembles trained on historical transaction data to generate accurate short and long-term forecasts — automating inventory planning and significantly reducing overstock and understock costs.
